name: Escalloped Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 cups freshly cooked or canned tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add shredded green pepper, salt, pepper, sugar, and grated onion to the tomatoes.
2. Place a layer of bread crumbs in the bottom of a greased baking dish.
3. Add half the tomatoes, some bits of butter, more crumbs, and the remaining tomatoes on top.
4. Sprinkle the top thickly with crumbs and dot with butter.
5. Bake uncovered at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the tomatoes are heated through and the crumbs are brown.
